title: Add logic for enabling the openshift test suite
body:
Add a build-rpms.sh script and Dockerfile that will
be used to enable the openshift aws test suites.

Will open the corresponding PR in openshift/release once this is in.

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>

@baude @mheon @rhatdan can we please get this in.
